title: GRF transition-shell full-solve certificate gate
result: Defines the executable obligation gate for a full GRF transition-shell solve. The gate remains open until all eight certificate obligations are supplied and verified.

required_obligations.required_object: bounds on m, m', m'', Phi', Phi'', Phi''' producing concrete L_cell
certified interval propagation across the full transition shell
all required WEC/DEC component inequalities verified
inner-shell-outer smooth matching with required regularity
admissible geometry/matter realization for chosen functions and parameters
executable final certificate package with no overclaim boundary

closure_rule: GRF theorem-level closure is forbidden unless every required obligation has status VERIFIED and the executable certificate checker passes.
boundary: not a positive inner-boundary margin proof
